title: Chapter 8
content:
Chapter 8

Fortunately, the power of this world was mana. It wasn’t as smooth as the mana I was used to, but it wasn’t too erratic like Ki. It was somewhere between both, or it leaned more on the smooth side with some erratic behavior in its course.

[Intelligence: 1]

[MP: 10\10]

I wasn’t full of power, but it was something. Although I couldn’t use the system skills without MP, I could still use the power in my body, only the consumption would be a lot more than usual.

For example, if I were to use the spell cleanse on myself, I would use at least 100 MP, but if I did it with the system skill, the maximum consumption would be 20 or less if my condition wasn’t too much.

That was why it was more efficient to use skills through the system. However, I had none at the moment. So I would have to use skills naturally, but the only problem that presented was that I would need at least 100 MP for the weakest of spells in my arsenal.

Well, I guess I will be visiting the sewer again the next day.

~~

Evening came and I was alone in my room when a boy, a bit older than me, so he could be called a young man, entered the room and smiled at me, “So good to see you’re doing great, brother.”

I would assume him to be Lucas. The brother of Jack.

“Thanks, brother,” I stood up with a smile that made the smile on Lucas’s face disappear, and a frown came over as he said, “What? Are you too confident that you awakened? Don’t forget. You’re the weaker and useless one.”

Harsh. I didn’t need anyone to tell me that this guy was a typical kind of bully, and he and Jack didn’t have a very harmonious relationship as Rayla would have portrayed.

Well, as long as it’s just sibling rivalry, I was willing to keep up. “Whatever you say,” I replied with a smile and passed him to go down when he suddenly moved to grab me. But his speed was slower, not to mention the mana I sensed from him wasn’t that much. It was only ten times more than mine, and he didn’t seem to know how to efficiently power up his limbs with it.

I caught his fist with my open palm and kicked him in the stomach without a warning. I didn’t put in any mana because I didn't want to do any permanent damage. After all, this guy was an idiot. No point in dealing with idiots.

“See you down, brother,” I said and left the room, leaving him coughing up on the floor.

I came down and just as I entered the kitchen area, a girl ran into me and hugged me tightly, “Brother!”

She was smaller than I, so I assumed she was also younger than I. And her calling me ‘brother’ was another obvious clue.

She let go of me, raised her head to look at me, and said happily, “I was so thrilled when I heard you awakened naturally. So much so that I couldn’t believe it. Can you show me?”

I didn’t know how I was supposed to do that. When I raised my head, I saw another girl who looked like a carbon copy of Rayla with her big breasts popping out of her top. She had similar facial features, and the only difference between her and Rayla was her hair color. Unlike Rayla, who was blonde, she was black-haired like the other man in the room, who was looking at me with an expectant expression.

The kind a father has for his son.

As for the little girl who was still clinging to me, she was black haired, but she wasn’t much in the chest department. Actually, that was me being modest because she was flat as a board with that shirt on her.

It might be because she was still young, so I would give her a little while to grow up. As for her facial features, they resembled the man to a great extent. Her eyes were blue like the man's, and Lucas, who was spitting saliva upstairs.

I wonder what I looked like since I hadn’t seen a mirror since I came here, but with so low charm, I wouldn’t expect much.

“Of course,” I replied with a smile and took off my shirt. No one admonished me, but instead focused on my well-developed muscles. They were silent for a little while when the little girl woke everyone from their stupor.

“It’s true!!!” She jumped up and down and hugged me again and again. The others also collected themselves as the black-haired girl who looked to be the oldest came to me and said, “Congratulations, brother.”

I nodded and grabbed her chest. She looked at me curiously and asked, “What are you doing?”

“Oh, that’s the new relaxation skill Jack has practiced. He used it on me earlier today, and it felt really good.” Rayla explained on my behalf.

“Really? Then can you help me too, son?” The man in the room asked.

Yeah right. I was allergic to other men other than me. “It only works on those with big breasts, unfortunately.”

I replied, making an excuse. “Oh. So it only works on women.” The man said as if it were truly unfortunate. As for the little girl before me asked with a pouty face, “Then it won’t work on me?”

“It might. I will try later.” I replied while giving the girl, whom I assumed to be my sister as well, a few gropes, pressing into her giant pillows. They weren’t as big as Rayla’s, but I would still need two hands to grab just one, probably.

“Well, anyways. Congratulations, son. You can now be at ease regarding the awakening ceremony. Since natural awakeners are regarded highly.” The man said.

All the while he said that, the small nipple of my sister was now slightly visible, so I slightly touched it with my finger.

“Ahhpp!” She suddenly exclaimed.

“What’s wrong?” The father asked.

“Oh, it’s just the beginning of Jack’s method. She will be very good in a little while,” Rayla once again replied in my stead. As for the girl, she still didn’t move away, so I began to play with her nipple fully from outside her clothes.

Since it wasn’t fully in my grasp, I was a little stronger with my approach, but still remained in the sensual line since I didn’t want to push her away. Pain and pleasure are too distinct in people as much as others would hope.

If a girl said that spanking hurts, then it really did. So it was always better to be better in your approach. Of course, there were some girls who enjoyed pain, but I doubted girls who didn’t even know their nipples could be stimulated would feel any pleasure.

As I played with her nipple, her moans began to spread through the room.

“Are you sure you are okay?” The father asked, a little concerned.

“Yes… It feels… funny… but—ahhhnnnn—go..good.” The girl replied between short breaths.

“Really? I don’t understand anything about it.” The man said, uninterested, and turned to me again, “If you want, you can join me tomorrow on the hunt, son.”

As much as I would have liked to say yes, I couldn’t because then I would be under his surveillance. I needed to head to the sewer and raise my intelligence to the point where I could use some decent-sized spells at least.

But I couldn’t even begin to utter my reply when Rayla angrily spoke, “Absolutely not! My son is not going to go there again. Not until he completes the town’s training.”

I was right. Whatever happened to me happened in that forest, so Rayla was against me going there. I was more than happy to follow, so I said, “Maybe some other time, father. I would like to completely recover first.” I said while I pinched my sister’s nipple gently.

“Very well. But I will look forward to the time when we can hunt together.” The father said before he added, “Well, I will go and have a bath now.”

“I will prepare dinner,” Rayla said.

“I will also take a bath, but let’s take a bath together, brother. You stink, so you haven’t taken a bath either, right?” My little sister cutely said.

I nodded and said, “Of course. I will take a bath with you, but let me properly relax, sister, first.” I said. Since I didn’t know her name, I only addressed her as ‘sister’.

“All right! It’s a promise,” With that, my little sister let go of me and skipped to the stairs to the other room that I saw upstairs. I turned my attention back to the girl who was slightly moaning under my stimulation and said with a smile, “Why don’t you take off your top, sister? It will make the massage even more pleasurable.”
